---
title: "Queen Emma"
---

## Queen Emma

**Dates:** (1836-1885)

### Description

Queen consort of Hawaii

### Biography

She visited England in 1865-6 to raise funds for an Anglican cathedral and girls' school.

### Letters

- Letter from May 13th [1867]
- Letter from April 5. 1866.
- Letter from March 29, 1866.
- Letter from Aug. 26 [1865]
- Letter from August 19, 1865.
- Letter from Febry 3d [1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
